scripts.format:py: cd backend/api-server && uv run ruff format .
scripts.clean: rm -rf frontend/web-client/node_modules frontend/web-client/dist backend/api-server/__pycache__ backend/api-server/.pytest_cache backend/api-server/.venv
scripts.api:dev: cd backend/api-server && uv run uvicorn main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.api:lint: cd backend/api-server && uv run ruff check .
scripts.api:lint:fix: cd backend/api-server && uv run ruff check . --fix
scripts.api:format: cd backend/api-server && uv run ruff format .
